changes: Rewrote SKILL.md from 197 lines to ~70 lines, removing all irrelevant workflows (redlining, tracked changes, image conversion, OOXML editing)
Added explicit instruction to always write output files to disk (fixed docx-extract scoring 0 because model never wrote invoice_data.json)
Replaced pandoc text extraction with python-docx extraction script (fixed docx-create content criterion failing because pandoc wraps lines at 72 chars, breaking 'March 2026' across lines)
Removed ooxml.md, ooxml/ directory (60+ XSD schemas), scripts/ directory, and LICENSE.txt — none referenced by final SKILL.md
Kept docx-js.md as the only reference document (needed for document creation API)
